title: Employer Dashboard Scoping
summary: Scoped the Employer Dashboard feature and discovered the HQ concept from the platform blueprint, adding it as a new roadmap item.

breakdowns.heading: Employer Dashboard Plan
bullets: Wrote 6-step plan (v0.6.x): data layer, overview, my bookings, employee table, employee actions, booking history
Created .claude/plans/employer-dashboard.md with component architecture and edge cases

breakdowns.heading: HQ Feature Discovery
bullets: Read platform blueprint v3.1 -- found HQ: employer lists own office as internal bookable space
Added feature #11 to ROADMAP.md with Property Wizard dependency
Updated dashboard plan to include HQ nav placeholder in Step 1

commitLog.message: Scope Employer Dashboard [APP] and add HQ to roadmap

todaySessions.summary: Scoped Employer Dashboard and discovered HQ feature from platform blueprint

timeline.desc: Explored codebase for dashboard data dependencies
Read platform blueprint, discovered HQ feature
Updated plan and roadmap with HQ feature #11

decisions.title: HQ as separate feature, not part of dashboard
decisions.problem: HQ (employer internal workspace) could be bundled into Employer Dashboard or kept separate
decisions.solution: Kept separate as feature #11 because it depends on Property Wizard (#8) which builds the 8-tab property management flow. Dashboard adds nav placeholder only.

awaitingSignOff.summary: Multi-step booking modal: space selection, date/time, guests, price, confirmation

groups.name: Modal & Navigation
items: Clicking Book a Space opens modal with space selection grid
Clicking per-space Book this space opens modal at date step
Back button navigates between steps correctly
Escape key closes modal
Full flow works end-to-end: select space, pick date, set guests, confirm

groups.name: Date & Duration
items: Calendar renders with today highlighted, past dates greyed
Duration options only show tiers the space supports
Hourly selection shows available time slots

groups.name: Pricing & Confirmation
items: Price breakdown shows correct calculation for each duration type
Guest count capped at space capacity
Instant booking shows confirmation, manual shows pending message

groups.name: Responsive
items: Modal becomes full-screen on mobile

awaitingSignOff.summary: Split-view search with filters, property cards, map, URL sync, responsive layout

groups.name: Property Cards
items: Card renders with thumbnail, name, city, rating, badges, and price in a compact layout
Hover state shows subtle visual feedback (elevation or border)

groups.name: Filters & URL Sync
items: Selecting filters updates the URL bar in real time
Pasting a URL with filter params pre-selects the correct filters
Clear all resets filters and URL
On mobile filters appear in a slide-up drawer

groups.name: Map
items: Map (or fallback) renders with pins at correct relative positions
Pin shows price and uses brand colors

groups.name: Split View & Interaction
items: Split view shows list on left, map on right on desktop
Hovering a card highlights the corresponding map pin
Clicking a map pin scrolls to and highlights the corresponding card
Filters reduce the visible results in both list and map
On mobile List/Map toggle switches between full-width views
Empty state shows when no properties match filters

groups.name: Responsive & SSR
items: View page source shows property names and prices in HTML (SSR working)
Mobile layout is usable at 375px width (iPhone SE)
Tablet layout (768px) shows a sensible split or toggle
Empty state appears when all filters are set to impossible values
Tab key navigates through filter controls in logical order

nextUp: Promote Employer Dashboard to Queue with contracts, build Steps 1-6. Test Booking Flow + Search manual items.
